across.clue: A butler is the most important male servant in a wealthy house.
To recall something is to remember it.
Exile is the state of being forced to leave one’s country.
Fertile land is able to produce good crops and plants.
If something is metropolitan, it relates to a large city.
To erect something means to build it.
Filth is dirt or dirty things that disgust you.
An assassin is someone who murders an important person.

down.clue: The globe refers to the Earth.
Bronze is a brown metal made from copper and tin.
A hermit is one who lives alone and does not spend time with others.
a natural tendency to behave in a particular way that people and animals are born with and that they obey without knowing why.
An overnight action happens during the night.
happening in a natural way without being planned or thought about.
Camouflage is something used to hide people and things.
Equality is the state of being equal, especially in rights and opportunities.
When something is inherent, it is a natural part of something else.
If you do something anew, you do it again, possibly in a different way.
if something is scarce there is not very much of it.
To do something that will cause problems in the future; to keep a lot of something. | ___ up
